query:
UPDATE products SET 
  title = CASE 
    WHEN asin = 'B098KWTXDJ' THEN '14K Rose Gold Sapphire Ring with Diamond Halo'
    WHEN asin = 'B07W97WCGW' THEN 'Silver Diamond Pendant Necklace'
    WHEN asin = 'B01M0VLHQI' THEN '14K Gold Chain Necklace with Black Moon Charm'
    WHEN asin = 'B0033518FK' THEN 'Rose Gold Moonstone Bracelet'
    ELSE title
  END,
  category = CASE
    WHEN asin = 'B098KWTXDJ' THEN 'rings'
    WHEN asin = 'B07W97WCGW' THEN 'necklaces'
    WHEN asin = 'B01M0VLHQI' THEN 'necklaces'
    WHEN asin = 'B0033518FK' THEN 'bracelets'
    ELSE category
  END,
  metalType = CASE
    WHEN asin = 'B098KWTXDJ' THEN 'rose_gold'
    WHEN asin = 'B07W97WCGW' THEN 'silver'
    WHEN asin = 'B01M0VLHQI' THEN 'gold'
    WHEN asin = 'B0033518FK' THEN 'rose_gold'
    ELSE metalType
  END,
  tags = CASE
    WHEN asin = 'B098KWTXDJ' THEN '["rings","rose_gold"]'
    WHEN asin = 'B07W97WCGW' THEN '["necklaces","silver"]'
    WHEN asin = 'B01M0VLHQI' THEN '["necklaces","gold"]'
    WHEN asin = 'B0033518FK' THEN '["bracelets","rose_gold"]'
    ELSE tags
  END
WHERE asin IN ('B098KWTXDJ', 'B07W97WCGW', 'B01M0VLHQI', 'B0033518FK');
